title: Cozy Horror
description: An assortment of mods to add elements of both horror and coziness to Minecraft.
body:
Originally titled "Please Be Fun 2," Cozy Horror is a collection of mods chosen to provide a spookier atmosphere and extra challenges balanced with comforting and safe escapes.

Terrifying creatures hunt you in the dark, Sculk spreads unnaturally close to the surface, eldritch secrets hide in the deapths...
so make a cozy little candle-lit cottage to bunker down in with a warm cup of tea and your favorite furry/feathered companion.

in addition to the horror/comfort are a few magic and tech mods to help with defence, exploration and automation.
